pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and stuns constructs

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Shadow-Stalker reveals a hidden lever opening the door to the Operating Theater.

pickup.effect: Enhances weapon attacks against undead targets

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Glass Construct triggers an alarm that awakens the Ancient Warden.

pickup.name: Ancient Key of the Asylum

boss.name: The Malformed Guardian

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Scout releases a pressure valve which opens the path to the main hall.
Shutting down the Automaton triggers the factory alarm, activating the assembly line conveyor.
Destruction of the Sentinel shorts out the power, unlocking the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Master Gear-Smith
boss.victory_condition: Overload the master turbine using the core.

output.objective: Repair the primary factory stabilizer to stop the chaotic machinery overload.
output.reward: Golden Cog Trophy and Blueprint for Advanced Gadgets.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Steam Sprayer forces the pressure valves to vent, revealing the Generator Core entry.
Securing the Lightning Inverter activates the automated turret security sequence for the next zone.
Destroying the Arachnid triggers an emergency shutdown that unseals the Boss vault.

boss.name: The Iron Tyrant
boss.victory_condition: Apply Acid Vial to the Tyrant's core to disable its shielding.

output.objective: Infiltrate the Clockwork Under-City and terminate the Iron Tyrant to stop the factory's expansion.
output.reward: Blueprint for the Master Gear Amulet

boss.victory_condition: Synchronize the boss heart with the timeline using the key to shut down the machine
